summary: Sign convention unified across both magnetic predictions. New sign_convention block under contents top-level: all amplitudes are SIGNED deviations from quiet-day H-component baseline (negative = Sq suppression). B1-M-001 amplitude_range_nT_signed restated as [-25, -5] (was unsigned [5, 25] in rev1). B2-M-001 amplitude_range_nT_signed unchanged at [-12.83, -5.04] (already signed). All falsification criteria (OBS-D, OBS-S, OBS-O) updated to reference signed convention.
note_to_decider: Rev2 of EXP-283 addresses all six curmudgeon-flagged blockers (ISS-1801..1806) from queue_id=294 review. Recommend (a) close all six issues as fixed-by-revision, (b) re-route EXP-283 to curmudgeon for confirmation pass before OTS anchoring (revision_required=false in tracker, requires_frozen_prediction_review=true unchanged). Do NOT proceed to OTS anchoring until curmudgeon confirms rev2 closes the blockers.
